title: Sanitized Review Payload
description: Schema for a sanitized payload for review, removing sensitive information.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for the specific agent run.

review_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the review payload was generated.

sanitized_input_summary.description: Summary of the sanitized input data.

sanitized_output_summary.description: Summary of the sanitized output data.

legal_escalation_required.description: Indicates if legal escalation is required.
